title: Fix podman stats based on QE feedback
body:
QE found issues with formatting the go template and
the man page was lacking information.
Changed the format of the output to match latest docker.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Added shortID function and used it everywhere the ID is truncated.
Changes LGTM, but Red Hat CI isn't happy.

:pushpin: Commit 546134a has been approved by `rhatdan`
